title: Basirhat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Basirhat, with a Z-Score of +5.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current conditions in Basirhat are extremely hot, with a high temperature and a heat index exacerbated by 62% humidity. 
 The wind speed of 16.5 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat. 
 The CDD of 17.0 GG indicates a high energy demand for cooling, while the HDD of 0.0 GG shows no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Basirhat.
